boundedContext.featureGherkin:
Scenario: Block release without QA bundle
    Given a release candidate is proposed for promotion
    But no QA evidence bundle exists under `quality/end-user-test-bundles/<release-candidate-id>/`
    When the quality promotion gate runs
    Then the release candidate should be BLOCKED
    And the finding code should be:
      | finding |
      | release-candidate-without-end-user-qa-bundle |
    And CI/CD should not mark the release candidate releasable.
acceptanceCriteria: But no QA evidence bundle exists under `quality/end-user-test-bundles/<release-candidate-id>/`
Then the release candidate should be BLOCKED
And the finding code should be:
And CI/CD should not mark the release candidate releasable.
seedDataRules: seed data must be synthetic unless fixture data is explicitly allowed
seed data writes must stay inside allowed seed data paths
forbiddenActions: use secrets or personal data in seed data
mark this LLM run as QA passed
boundedContext.passFailReportingExpectations: report user-visible observations and link every pass or fail claim to evidence
